blended.narrative: Discovery is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,019 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
